intro: Customize your spaceship and set off on a fast-paced galactic adventure. Race through unique planets, blast enemies, dodge dangerous mines, and outmaneuver rivals.
description:
Build your ultimate spaceship and dive into a thrilling arcade-style space adventure. Customize every part of your ship—from body and wings to engine and weapons—then launch into fast-paced battles across the galaxy. Speed through dense asteroid fields, unleash powerful rockets, and take down enemy ships while skillfully avoiding deadly mines and hazards.

Explore two distinct planets, each offering unique environments and challenges, from vast open space to dangerous planetary surfaces. Stay sharp as rival pilots try to outgun and outmaneuver you in intense combat encounters. With responsive controls, upgradeable abilities, and nonstop action, every mission pushes your reflexes and strategy to the limit.

Outfly, outfight, and outlast your enemies to conquer the galaxy and prove you’re the ultimate pilot.
